data.title: Nox Group promotes executives, organizes team for growing demand of industrial facilities nationwide.
data.description: Nox Group, a leading hyper-scale industrial construction company based in Phoenix, recently revealed a significant series of changes within its executive team and organizational structure. The adjustments are aimed at accommodating the increasing demand for critical industrial facilities such as data centers, semiconductor plants, and water infrastructure throughout the country. Notably growing in Arizona, Nox Group has implemented a revamped leadership framework to enhance its operations and support its expansion.

data.title: Suncoast Credit Union partners with College Ave to offer improved student loan program in Tampa, launching Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on January 13, 2026, Suncoast Credit Union revealed a partnership with College Ave, a key player in private student loans, to introduce an enhanced student loan and refinancing initiative. data.title: Remodel Health partners with UKG to simplify ICHRA administration using HR and payroll data sync. - 97 characters
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Remodel Health announced an integration aimed at streamlining ICHRA administration by syncing HR and payroll data. This integration is expected to simplify the process of managing Individual Coverage Health Reimbursement Arrangements. Remodel Health, a prominent provider of ICHRA solutions, unveiled this initiative to enhance efficiency and convenience for businesses. This technology update demonstrates a commitment to optimizing benefits administration and is poised to revolutionize how companies handle health reimbursements. With this integration, businesses can expect a more seamless and automated approach to managing ICHRA, potentially saving them time and resources in the process.

data.title: Lone River Ranch Water partners with Diamond Cross Ranch for outdoor Après Ski Collection in Jackson Hole, Wyo.
data.description: A popular hard seltzer brand, Lone River, known for its Ranch Water in a can, has launched a new collection in collaboration with Diamond in Jackson Hole, Wyoming. The brand, originating from Texas, emphasizes movement, fresh air, and outdoor leisure in its latest line. This partnership brings a refreshing twist to the iconic Jackson Hole ranch. The announcement was made on January 13, 2026, by the brand through PRNewswire.

data.title: Cryptex Finance appoints Canary Capital as strategic advisor for digital asset index products.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, Cryptex Finance revealed that Canary Capital has come on board as a strategic advisor as the company moves forward with its plans for publicly traded digital asset index products. Canary Capital will be offering guidance to Cryptex Finance on aspects such as market structure and index construction. This development marks a significant step in the growth of Cryptex Finance as it continues to expand its offerings in the digital asset market.

data.title: APAA praises Trump Administration for investment in Atlantic Alumina Co., the only major alumina producer in U.S.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Washington, the American Primary Aluminum Association (APAA) praised the Trump Administration for its support of Atlantic Alumina Co. (ATALCO). The APAA, acknowledging ATALCO as the sole major alumina producer in the U.S., highlighted the significance of the administration's investment in the company.

data.title: Membrane Labs introduces new EFP Workflow for BTC and ETH, allowing seamless spot crypto transfer for futures via CME Group.
data.description: A new workflow has been introduced allowing for easy transfer of spot cryptocurrency for a corresponding futures position through Exchange for Physical (EFP) transactions on CME Group. Membrane Labs, a leader in digital asset prime infrastructure, is launching this innovative solution in New York on January 13, 2026. This development will streamline the process and enhance trading efficiency for market participants.

data.title: Will Smith captivates Dubai at premiere of 'Pole to Pole with Will Smith' at The Sustainable City; event held at SEE Institute.
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates on January 13, 2026, world-renowned entertainer Will Smith graced the blue carpet at the long-awaited Middle East debut of National Geographic's exclusive series, Pole to Pole with Will Smith. The premiere unfolded at SEE Institute, serving as the first net-zero facility in the region, marking a significant step towards sustainability.

data.title: Neurology clinic in LA using CBD IV therapy with patented technology; PICO IV collaboration in clinical setting.
data.description: PICO IV announced on January 13, 2026, their new initiative of integrating patented CBD technology into a clinical environment guided by neurologists. Based in Sacramento, California, PICO IV is renowned for its sterile CBD solutions. This innovative collaboration aims to enhance the medical application of CBD within a controlled clinical setting.

data.title: Brillio acknowledged as a top leader in life sciences services by HFS Horizons 2025 report. AI innovation highlighted.
data.description: Brillio, a leading Enterprise AI Accelerator, has been acknowledged as a top performer in the HFS Horizons report for their AI-driven innovation yielding significant improvements in health outcomes, cost reduction, patient experience enhancement, and promoting equity in healthcare. The recognition further highlights Brillio's impactful contributions to the industry, reinforcing its position as a pioneer in leveraging AI technology for positive advancements. This recognition comes as a testament to Brillio's commitment to driving measurable outcomes in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Cotocon advises NYC building owners to treat 2026 as compliance reset year, urging full reset for energy compliance.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in New York City, The Cotocon Group is recommending building owners, property managers, and boards to see the upcoming year as a complete reset for building energy compliance as the city enters the 2026 compliance cycle. This includes adhering to overlapping deadlines set by various local regulations. It is essential for stakeholders to pay close attention and ensure adherence to these guidelines for energy efficiency.

data.title: Rancho La Gloria introduces 10% malt-based tall boy margaritas in Lime and Strawberry flavors in select states.
data.description: Introducing revamped versions of Lime and Strawberry Margaritas with exciting flavors perfect for a great time, now offered in specific states such as California, Texas, and Arizona. Media materials are available for download. The news was announced in Sausalito, California on January 13, 2026. The makers of the beloved agave-wine based beverage in the United States have introduced these remixes.

data.title: Epic Homes launches $1,000 Trades Scholarship for local students in Maple Ridge, BC, aiming to support skilled youth.
data.description: In Maple Ridge, British Columbia, Epic Homes, a construction company with a 20-year history of constructing close to 1,000 homes, recognizes the significance of skilled individuals in fostering robust communities in addition to providing housing. This ethos is fundamental to Epic Homes’ mission of Making Things Better, prompting them to introduce the Epic Homes Youth Trades Scholarship in 2026. This scholarship aims to support local high school students, specifically those from Maple Ridge Secondary, Samuel Robertson Technical, or Gar, by awarding $1,000 to three deserving recipients.
